name: Extraction Quality Evaluation
description: Build scripts/eval_extraction_quality.py: sample 50 papers from extractions table, run entity resolver on all mentions, compute precision/recall/match_method distribution, output unmatched mentions. Write results to .claude/prd-build-artifacts/extraction-quality-eval.md. This is the blocking gate for SsODNet scope.
acceptance: File scripts/eval_extraction_quality.py exists and is importable
Script samples 50 papers from extractions table using EntityResolver
Output includes precision and recall numbers
Output includes match_method distribution
Output includes unmatched mention examples
Tests in tests/test_eval_extraction_quality.py pass: pytest tests/test_eval_extraction_quality.py

name: SPASE Harvester Update v2.7.1
description: Update scripts/harvest_spase.py: replace urllib with ResilientClient, update SPASE_VERSION from 2.7.0 to 2.7.1, write to entities table (in addition to entity_dictionary) using harvest_utils.upsert_entity, store entity_identifiers with id_scheme='spase_resource_id', add HarvestRunLog lifecycle. Update tests accordingly.
acceptance: harvest_spase.py imports ResilientClient from scix.http_client (no urllib usage)
SPASE_VERSION constant is '2.7.1'
harvest_spase.py imports and uses HarvestRunLog from scix.harvest_utils
harvest_spase.py calls upsert_entity from scix.harvest_utils
harvest_spase.py stores entity_identifiers with id_scheme='spase_resource_id'
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_harvest_spase.py

name: Modernize Existing Harvesters to ResilientClient + HarvestRunLog
description: Update 6 existing harvesters to use ResilientClient (replace urllib) and add HarvestRunLog lifecycle: harvest_ascl.py, harvest_aas_facilities.py, harvest_vizier.py, harvest_pwc_methods.py, harvest_physh.py, harvest_astromlab.py. Follow the pattern established by harvest_gcmd.py (import ResilientClient, create client, use client.get() instead of urllib, wrap in HarvestRunLog start/complete/fail). Update corresponding tests.
acceptance: harvest_ascl.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
harvest_aas_facilities.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
harvest_vizier.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
harvest_pwc_methods.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
harvest_physh.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
harvest_astromlab.py imports ResilientClient and HarvestRunLog (no urllib usage)
All harvest tests pass: pytest tests/test_harvest_ascl.py tests/test_harvest_aas.py tests/test_harvest_vizier.py tests/test_harvest_pwc.py tests/test_harvest_physh.py tests/test_harvest_astromlab.py

name: SsODNet Harvester
description: Build scripts/harvest_ssodnet.py: download ssoBFT Parquet file (or API-based seed) using ResilientClient with SHA-256 checksum and HTTP Range resume, parse into entities (canonical_name from IAU-preferred designation, entity_type='target', source='ssodnet'), store entity_identifiers (ssodnet name with id_scheme='ssodnet', SPK-ID with id_scheme='sbdb_spkid'), store entity_aliases (all known designations), store physical properties (diameter, albedo, taxonomy) in entities.properties, use staging schema (migration 022) for bulk load with staging.promote_entities() for atomic promote, log harvest_run with satellite count validation. Write tests.
acceptance: File scripts/harvest_ssodnet.py exists and is importable
Script imports and uses ResilientClient from scix.http_client
Script imports and uses HarvestRunLog from scix.harvest_utils
Script supports both bulk (ssoBFT Parquet) and seed (API) modes via CLI flag
Script uses staging schema for bulk load (references staging.promote_entities or equivalent)
Script stores entity_identifiers with id_scheme='ssodnet' and id_scheme='sbdb_spkid'
Script stores entity_aliases for all known designations
Script stores physical properties in entities.properties JSONB field
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_harvest_ssodnet.py

name: CMR Collection Harvester
description: Build scripts/harvest_cmr.py: use ResilientClient to paginate NASA CMR collections via Search-After headers, request UMM-JSON format (Accept: application/vnd.nasa.cmr.umm_results+json), store as datasets (source='cmr', canonical_id=concept-id), extract instruments/platforms/science_keywords and cross-reference GCMD entities via entity_identifiers(id_scheme='gcmd_uuid'), deduplicate on concept-id, log harvest_run with page counts. Write tests.
acceptance: File scripts/harvest_cmr.py exists and is importable
Script imports and uses ResilientClient from scix.http_client
Script imports and uses HarvestRunLog from scix.harvest_utils
Script uses Search-After header pagination (not offset-based)
Script requests UMM-JSON format via Accept header
Script stores datasets with source='cmr'
Script extracts instruments, platforms, science_keywords from UMM-JSON
Script cross-references GCMD entities via entity_identifiers with id_scheme='gcmd_uuid'
Script deduplicates on concept-id
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_harvest_cmr.py

name: SBDB Enrichment Harvester
description: Build scripts/harvest_sbdb.py: query JPL SBDB API for objects already in entities table (from SsODNet) to add orbital elements, use ResilientClient with rate_limit={'ssd.jpl.nasa.gov': 1} (1 concurrent per IP), update entities.properties with orbital_class/neo/pha/discovery_date/discovery_site, resumable via harvest_runs.cursor_state (last processed entity_id), log harvest_run. Write tests.
acceptance: File scripts/harvest_sbdb.py exists and is importable
Script imports and uses ResilientClient with rate_limits={'ssd.jpl.nasa.gov': 1.0}
Script imports and uses HarvestRunLog from scix.harvest_utils
Script queries entities table for source='ssodnet' entities
Script updates entities.properties with orbital_class, neo, pha, discovery_date, discovery_site
Script implements cursor-based resumption via harvest_runs.cursor_state
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_harvest_sbdb.py

name: Wikidata Cross-Linking for New Entities
description: Extend scripts/enrich_wikidata_multi.py to query entities from the new entities table (not just entity_dictionary), store QIDs in entity_identifiers with id_scheme='wikidata'. The script currently only queries entity_dictionary. Add a new mode/flag that reads from the entities table and writes entity_identifiers rows. Update tests.
acceptance: enrich_wikidata_multi.py has a mode to query from entities table (not just entity_dictionary)
Script stores Wikidata QIDs in entity_identifiers with id_scheme='wikidata'
Existing entity_dictionary enrichment still works (no regression)
Tests pass: pytest tests/test_enrich_wikidata.py or equivalent test file
